svg.title: France Entity Migration to Oracle Project Kickoff
svg.desc: Migrated from FrameForge v1.5 (kind: presentation-deck) to v2.0. Slides became fixed Pages through a shared `deck` master; ellipses converted box->center/rx/ry; image href->src; v1 gradients and style keys mapped to v2.

text.tspan: Out of scope: Order To Cash (O2C)
